title: Hay Day
notes:
Hay Day is celebrating its 14th anniversary! Join the party with music, rewards, music festival decorations, and a series of very special events.

Birthday celebrations
- Create music, collect musical notes, and unlock music festival decorations.
- Take part in special birthday events across the farm.
- You can also turn the birthday music on or off in Settings.
